title: Uniface Installation Program
breadcrumbs: Installing and Configuring Uniface on Unix and Linux Platforms
text: Uniface Installation Program The Uniface installation program prompts you for information that it needs. Table 1. Information that may be requested Requested Information Description Destination File system location where Uniface should be installed. Note: It is not possible to install over an existing installation. Components Select the products and tools you want to install. Character set Choose the character set or code page appropriate for your language. Port numbers Port numbers to be used for the Uniface Router and Tomcat Web server. The installer checks whether the default port numbers are already in use and suggests the next available port numbers, but you can enter your preferred port numbers. License information Select the Sentinel license type, or choose to manually configure your license later. Related Links Installing Uniface on Unix and Linux The Uniface installation program and related files are provided in a .tar file. After extracting the file you can run the Uniface installer. Uniface Installer for Windows The Uniface installer prompts you for the information it needs, and provides on-screen guidance to help you make the appropriate choices. Was this topic helpful?
